The Problem

You're working hard — but
the admin is eating you alive.

If you're a solo nail tech running your business through Instagram and Facebook, you already know the pain.

📱
Buried in DMs
Clients ask about prices, availability, and services — and you're answering the same questions 20 times a week.
🚫
No-Shows & Cancellations
No deposit, no reminder, no show. Empty slots mean lost money you'll never get back.
💸
No Deposit Protection
You're holding time for clients who ghost. Without deposits, you have no protection.
⏰
Late Replies = Lost Clients
You're doing nails, not sitting on your phone. By the time you reply, they've booked someone else.
🔁
Weak Repeat Bookings
Clients forget to rebook. You forget to follow up. Your calendar stays unpredictable.
😤
Admin Stress
Tracking who owes deposits, who needs reminders, and who needs to rebook — all in your head. It's exhausting.
📅
Empty Slots After Cancellations
Someone cancels last minute. No system to fill it. That slot just disappears.
⭐
Missing Reviews
Happy clients forget to leave reviews. You never ask because there's no system. Your reputation suffers silently.
🤯
No Real System
Your booking process lives in DMs, texts, and your memory. That's not a system — that's stress.
The Solution

Your business,
running itself.

NailDesk is a done-for-you booking and follow-up system. We set it up for you. You just show up and do nails.

  • 🤖

    AI Booking Assistant

    Answers FAQs, shares pricing, and guides clients straight to booking — even at 2am.

  • 📅

    Google Calendar Connected

    Clients book real slots based on your live availability. No double-booking, no back and forth.

  • 💰

    Automatic Deposit Collection

    Deposits collected at booking. No deposit = no appointment. Simple.

  • 🔔

    Reminders That Actually Work

    24-hour and same-day reminders sent automatically. No-shows drop dramatically.

  • 🔄

    Rebooking & Follow-Up on Autopilot

    After each visit, clients get a gentle nudge to rebook. Your calendar fills itself.

  • 📸

    Instagram & Facebook Connected

    Inquiries from your social pages go straight into the booking flow. No more lost leads in DMs.

How It Works

Up and running in
under a week.

We do the heavy lifting so you can focus on your craft.

1
Connect Your Accounts

We link your Google Calendar, Instagram, and Facebook. You tell us your services and pricing. That's it.

2
We Set Everything Up

Our team configures your AI assistant, booking flow, deposit settings, and reminders. Done for you.

3
Clients Book & Pay

Inquiries from DMs and your booking link flow into confirmed, deposit-secured appointments automatically.

4
Grow on Autopilot

Reminders go out, rebooking prompts fire, reviews roll in. Your business runs smoother every week.

Questions

Everything you want
to know.

Is this made just for solo nail techs?
Yes, 100%. NailDesk is built specifically for independent nail techs, booth renters, and small beauty operators with 1–2 staff. It's not a salon management platform — it's a done-for-you booking and follow-up system for solo professionals.
Can clients book through Instagram and Facebook?
Yes. We connect directly to your Instagram and Facebook accounts so inquiries and DMs flow into your booking system automatically. No more lost leads in the DM pile.
Does it connect with Google Calendar?
Absolutely. NailDesk syncs with your Google Calendar so clients only see your real availability. When an appointment is booked, it goes straight onto your calendar — no manual entry needed.
Can I require a deposit before booking?
Yes, and we highly recommend it. NailDesk collects your deposit automatically during the booking process. No deposit, no confirmed appointment. It's one of the biggest ways we help reduce no-shows.
Will this actually help reduce no-shows?
Yes. The combination of deposits, 24-hour reminders, and same-day reminders dramatically reduces no-show rates. Our early users report up to 80% fewer no-shows after implementing the system.
Do I need to be tech-savvy to use this?
Not at all. That's the whole point. We set everything up for you. You tell us your services, pricing, and availability — we handle the rest. Once it's live, managing it is simple.
What if I don't have a website?
No problem. NailDesk doesn't require a website. Your booking flow can live entirely through Instagram, Facebook, and a simple booking link we provide. Most of our users don't have a traditional website.
I currently book everything through DMs. Will this actually work for me?
That's exactly who NailDesk is for. If you're booking through DMs right now, you're probably spending hours on admin and losing clients to slow replies. NailDesk puts that entire process on autopilot — so DMs become bookings without you lifting a finger.
Don't Wait

Your next client is sitting
in your DMs right now.

Every day without a real system is another day of lost bookings, no-shows, and admin stress. Let NailDesk handle the business side so you can focus on your craft.
